visual_description:
A close-up, shaky shot reveals a blurry, abstract background with a cool, blue and white color palette. The image is out of focus, showing indistinct shapes and textures. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a white, stylized font. The camera pans slightly across the indistinct scene. The audio begins with a sharp, high-pitched, and slightly distorted electronic sound, like a quick digital alert or a system notification.

The scene cuts to a medium close-up of a woman with long, dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a blue lanyard. She is in a dimly lit office, looking intently at a computer monitor just out of frame. Her expression is one of concentration and slight concern. A laptop is open on the desk in front of her. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. A woman then speaks in a clear, professional, and focused tone, as if giving a direct instruction. She says, "油头角，长辉工业大厦二楼" (Yau Tung Kok, 2nd floor, Cheung Wui Industrial Building).

The camera then cuts to a close-up of a man in a similar office
